title: Crystallized Ore
description: Simple crystal ore and crystal item to use with other crystallized mods!
body:
## This is the main mod in the series and required by all coming mods in the series!
The mod adds a fresh-looking crystal ore which drops a crystal!

In addition with other mods from the **Crystallized** series, you can craft cool new decorations in a crystallized style. Currently, this is the first addition mod:
_Crystallized Beds_: Adds beds with custom model and texture (who would have expected :D)

In addition with other mods from the Crystallized series, you can craft cool new decorations in a crystallized style. Currently, there are two other mods:
- ([Crystallized Beds](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystallized-beds))
- ([Crystallized Barrels](https://modrinth.com/mod/crystallized-barrels))

Keep an eye on the series to not miss out any new _Crystallized_ mods
